decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 7/10 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 8 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 133/3577 lines reworked (3.7%, 16/50). 0/35 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 7.7% (2/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 57. Session 11: 42 (process:30 efficiency:8 ttfw:4). Session 12: 44 (process:30 efficiency:9 ttfw:5).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 268/268 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Adapters use 2 different interfaces. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
